violations.text: Prep unit #1, and 1 door reach-in freezer gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC, gaskets are on order. Walk-in cooler door was observed in poor repair. Establishment is to replace door. Per PIC, walk-in cooler door is on order. New Violation. Correct By: 07/23/2025
The 3-bay sink was observed leaking. Establishment is to fix leak. New Violation. Correct By: 07/18/2025
The floor tiles/grout in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025

Prep unit #1, and 1 door reach-in freezer gaskets were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. Walk-in cooler was observed at 70 DF and in poor repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/25/2025
The floor tiles/grout in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/18/2025
